display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Jennifer and Joanna Absolutely Champers
programme.desc: Two of the country's best-loved comedians, Joanna Lumley and Jennifer Saunders, take a trip to France to find out how to put the bubbles into bubbly.

programme.title: David Jason's Secret Service
programme.desc: David Jason reveals the secret places, the people and the tales behind Britain's spy history, beginning with the origins of the British Secret Service.

programme.title: David Jason's Secret Service
programme.desc: David Jason examines stories of heroism in the Second World War and explores a world of assassins, saboteurs, commandos, real-life super-villains and the ultimate femmes fatales.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Silk Road
programme.desc: As her Silk Road journey draws to a close, Joanna Lumley travels across the Central Asian states of Uzbekistan and Kyrgyzstan.

programme.title: Jennifer and Joanna Absolutely Champers
programme.desc: Two of the country's best-loved comedians, Joanna Lumley and Jennifer Saunders, take a trip to France to find out how to put the bubbles into bubbly.

programme.title: David Jason's Secret Service
programme.desc: David Jason reveals the secret places, the people and the tales behind Britain's spy history, beginning with the origins of the British Secret Service.

programme.title: David Jason's Secret Service
programme.desc: David Jason examines stories of heroism in the Second World War and explores a world of assassins, saboteurs, commandos, real-life super-villains and the ultimate femmes fatales.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek encourages the team to buy a Francis Barnett Plover at auction, and the wheels come off the restoration of an MG Metro.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek thinks a 29,000-mile Ford Capri should be kept original, and the team also tackle a Hercules women's racing bike from the '50s.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek picks out a solid-looking 1969 MGB for the team to look out for at auction - after winning it, it is sent to a father-and-son team for restoration.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Dave alerts the team to a 1979 Lotus Esprit S3 - it's an expensive buy and a serious risk, but it's also a thoroughbred classic in need of a proper recommission.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The Restoring Classics team pays tribute to mid-'80s Midlands by breathing new life into what was once the fastest production MG ever made - the Montego Turbo.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek encourages the team to buy a Francis Barnett Plover at auction, and the wheels come off the restoration of an MG Metro.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek thinks a 29,000-mile Ford Capri should be kept original, and the team also tackle a Hercules women's racing bike from the '50s.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek picks out a solid-looking 1969 MGB for the team to look out for at auction - after winning it, it is sent to a father-and-son team for restoration.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Dave alerts the team to a 1979 Lotus Esprit S3 - it's an expensive buy and a serious risk, but it's also a thoroughbred classic in need of a proper recommission.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The Restoring Classics team pays tribute to mid-'80s Midlands by breathing new life into what was once the fastest production MG ever made - the Montego Turbo.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek encourages the team to buy a Francis Barnett Plover at auction, and the wheels come off the restoration of an MG Metro.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek thinks a 29,000-mile Ford Capri should be kept original, and the team also tackle a Hercules women's racing bike from the '50s.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek picks out a solid-looking 1969 MGB for the team to look out for at auction - after winning it, it is sent to a father-and-son team for restoration.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo conducts important research in an historic York tea room, discovers Leeds' textile heritage, and investigates Bradford's musical heritage.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Where are the missing billions? Exploring the tunnels, lakes, and secret caches used by the Nazis to hide spoils of war.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Why did the Nazis fight tooth and nail to protect the city of Luban? Abandoned factories, hidden tunnels, and strange rumours provide clues to the mystery.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: With Nazi Germany's rise to power, a long-abandoned canal project in East Prussia is resurrected, but the true purpose of this massive waterway comes into question.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: As Hitler's shadow engulfs Europe, ancient castles across the continent fall under Nazi control and are transformed to serve the ambitions of the Third Reich.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Where are the missing billions? Exploring the tunnels, lakes, and secret caches used by the Nazis to hide spoils of war.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Why did the Nazis fight tooth and nail to protect the city of Luban? Abandoned factories, hidden tunnels, and strange rumours provide clues to the mystery.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: With Nazi Germany's rise to power, a long-abandoned canal project in East Prussia is resurrected, but the true purpose of this massive waterway comes into question.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: As Hitler's shadow engulfs Europe, ancient castles across the continent fall under Nazi control and are transformed to serve the ambitions of the Third Reich.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Where are the missing billions? Exploring the tunnels, lakes, and secret caches used by the Nazis to hide spoils of war.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Why did the Nazis fight tooth and nail to protect the city of Luban? Abandoned factories, hidden tunnels, and strange rumours provide clues to the mystery.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: With Nazi Germany's rise to power, a long-abandoned canal project in East Prussia is resurrected, but the true purpose of this massive waterway comes into question.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: As Hitler's shadow engulfs Europe, ancient castles across the continent fall under Nazi control and are transformed to serve the ambitions of the Third Reich.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Where are the missing billions? Exploring the tunnels, lakes, and secret caches used by the Nazis to hide spoils of war.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Why did the Nazis fight tooth and nail to protect the city of Luban? Abandoned factories, hidden tunnels, and strange rumours provide clues to the mystery.

programme.title: World War 2 From Above
programme.desc: The fate of the island of Malta hung by a thread during the war. Using drones, experts explore the defences of Malta to understand how the island survived.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The experts visit Aberystwyth in west Wales, where finds include a painting that may be by an important Welsh artist.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team travel to Wightwick Manor near Wolverhampton, where items include an 18th-century lidded glass goblet.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team purchase a 1950s Austin Westminster rally car in the hope that seasoned competitor Dave Mathewson can win a race.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A super rare Reliant Scimitar GTC undergoes an expert recommission, leaving no bolt unturned. And a Honda CBR superbike from the 80s is in need of repair.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A D-Day Coverup?: A mile-and-a half of recently-excavated trenches, bunkers, barracks, and gun encasements near Pointe du Hoc, which tell a new story of D-Day.

programme.title: World War 2 From Above
programme.desc: The fate of the island of Malta hung by a thread during the war. Using drones, experts explore the defences of Malta to understand how the island survived.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The experts visit Aberystwyth in west Wales, where finds include a painting that may be by an important Welsh artist.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: The ways in which wild animals have adapted to survive in human population centres, from cobras hunting in houses to macaques stealing mobile phones to barter with.

programme.title: Explore with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve examines the friction between Eastern and Western mentalities in Turkey, finding tension between liberal and Islamic cultures.

programme.title: Simon Reeve's South America
programme.desc: Simon Reeve journeys through the remote northeast of South America from the spectacular Mount Roraima in Venezuela through Guyana, Suriname, and French Guiana.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team purchase a 1950s Austin Westminster rally car in the hope that seasoned competitor Dave Mathewson can win a race.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A super rare Reliant Scimitar GTC undergoes an expert recommission, leaving no bolt unturned. And a Honda CBR superbike from the 80s is in need of repair.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: In the 100th episode, Derek is in Northumberland to collect a rare 1975 NSU RO 80, Jack deals with a Mini Mayfair in a barn, and an Aston Martin DBS husk is auctioned.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry and Simon head to Suffolk to meet Terry and Sam who are living 'The Good Life'. The boys find rich pickings including an antique Tilley lamp and a fine old work bench.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: In Dorset, Michael Portillo visits Brownsea Island, where Robert Baden Powell began the scout movement in the early 20th century.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on the first leg of a journey from the coalfields of South Wales to the southernmost tip of Cornwall.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Italian ruins immortalised by Hollywood, a crumbling Chilean city with two lives and a brutalist Scottish relic whose prayers went unanswered.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a luxury resort that conceals a top-secret facility, a mysterious complex in Bali struck by disaster, and a relic of hope near Jerusalem.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave's drawn to a Fiat Uno 45 in '1970's beige', with 36,000 miles on the clock.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul hits the road to collect an old navy ambulance that served its time as a holiday camper.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Secret U-Boat Base?: The Spanish island of Villa Winter, which was suspected of being a port for German U-boats and part of a larger plan to invade the United States.

programme.title: World War 2 From Above
programme.desc: Few know the involvement of African American troops in the Battle of the Bulge. Experts tell the story of those who fought a war against racism in a segregated army.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents updates on the most important and talked-about finds from the 35th series.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team travel to Fountains Abbey near Ripon in North Yorkshire, where a set of Inuit carvings, and a 17th-century gold ring are appraised.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team are on the hunt to restore one of the greatest names in motoring history - the Bugatti. But with a strict budget they settle for a replica.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team take on a modern day fast Ford to see if a 'quick flip' could make a few quid and revisit a 3 year MG restoration project that's still not finished.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Secret U-Boat Base?: The Spanish island of Villa Winter, which was suspected of being a port for German U-boats and part of a larger plan to invade the United States.

programme.title: World War 2 From Above
programme.desc: Few know the involvement of African American troops in the Battle of the Bulge. Experts tell the story of those who fought a war against racism in a segregated army.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents updates on the most important and talked-about finds from the 35th series.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: The stories of conservation heroes fighting to save the world's wildlife, from exploring remote jungles to going undercover to disrupt the illegal ivory trade.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek picks up a one owner Mark 1 Cortina that's been holed up in a garage for over a quarter of a century. Paul and daughter Kate collect a Reliant Sc.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek has to extract a vintage car from its bizarre resting place, while Charlie picks up a Vauxhall Viva from a man who has owned it for over half a century.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team are on the hunt to restore one of the greatest names in motoring history - the Bugatti. But with a strict budget they settle for a replica.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team take on a modern day fast Ford to see if a 'quick flip' could make a few quid and revisit a 3 year MG restoration project that's still not finished.

programme.title: Taskmaster Australia
programme.desc: This week Tom Cashman is disturbed and then cheered on in a race against himself. Then the best catch with a pair of tongs proves to be quite difficult for some and incredible for others. S5 E8

programme.title: St. Denis Medical
programme.desc: Alex's husband gets treated by Bruce, Joyce goes on an accidental journey, and Ron's shoes squeak. S2 E13

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Taskmaster Greg Davies and his sidekick Alex Horne test the wit of Daisy May Cooper, Johnny Vegas, Katherine Parkinson, Mawaan Rizwan and Richard Herring.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team shuts down an entire casino in an effort to find the person who shot a man at point-blank range. S12 E19

programme.title: Family Massacre
programme.desc: A family's murder may have been a revenge killing due to the father's career in law enforcement.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Damages
programme.desc: Patty, Tom and Ellen search for Carol Tobin after hitting a dead end at the bank. Meanwhile, tensions rise when personal matters surface and Frobisher pushes his new public image. S3 E8

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: When Glenn and Dina offer amnesty to all the employees for any bad things they confess, Garrett and Cheyenne try to decide how to take advantage of it. S3 E15

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature.

programme.title: Buzz's Epic Little Missions
programme.desc: Buzz goes time traveling, finds some mysterious objects hidden in the ngahere, paddles a real-life waka, and Dad challenges Buzz to a tuatua cook-off. Who will win?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join these beloved blue characters as they go on all new adventures that will push the charm, absurdity, and humour of the original series to even greater heights!

programme.title: Scooby Doo And Guess Who?
programme.desc: The team is back and just as courageous, adventurous, humorous & obsessed with cases like before. They are joined by celebrities in their adventures and ghost hunts and in search of puzzles to solve.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: The superheroes Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy love saving the world. But after they decide to stop fighting crime, things do not go as planned.

programme.title: Lu And The Bally Bunch
programme.desc: Navigating preschool life can be tricky! Lu the affectionate ladybird is used to getting her own way - but now, alongside her new classmates, she must learn what it means to be a good friend.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Takaro Tribe as they sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whanau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: Aussie Classics week draws to a close with an exciting day in the MasterChef Kitchen as guest judge and Aussie icon Robert Irwin sets an Aussie Native Ingredients Elimination Challenge.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Poppy feels hopeless.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Harper throws caution to the wind. Sonny faces an ultimatum. David’s big day is bittersweet. Beau changes the rules.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp hosts a nail-biting quiz. Using knowledge, strategy and a little luck, contestants must cross the Bridge, spotting the lies. One wrong step and they lose everything.

programme.title: Good Chef, Bad Chef
programme.desc: Mike, Jacq, Tim and Jo create stunning dishes, balancing bold flavours and wholesome ingredients. Every meal is a delight-what will you try first?

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: Our Guides are going on a tour of Northern Tassie. They'll try caving, visit historic Beaconsfield, and drive up (and mountain bike down!) Australia's most dangerous road.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After stumbling upon some teenage Wiccans, Lisa accepts an invitation to join their coven. S21 E7

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy are faced with a devastating conundrum when they learn from a Russian paper that Super-Asymmetry has already been discovered and...disproven! S12 E9

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: John buckles under pressure. David and Amelia strike a deal. Sonny does the unthinkable.

programme.title: Celebrity Sabotage
programme.desc: This week celebs take on 'The Great Kitchen Cook Off’ a fake cookery themed show hosted by Celebrity Chef Monica Galetti, who is totally in on the whole thing. S1 E3

programme.title: The Summit UK
programme.desc: Series Premiere: Ben Shephard presents the first episode of a thrilling reality series as 14 ordinary Brits set off to climb one of New Zealand's highest peaks to win a share of 200,000 pounds.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Taskmaster Greg Davies and sidekick Alex Horne test the wit of five comedians. Tonight, Katherine Parkinson forgets how balloons work and Richard Herring flails around in a dinghy. S10 E2

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When Stokes learns that a man he helped put in prison is going to have his conviction overturned, the CSI team needs to prove the killer is guilty again or he will be released. S12 E20

programme.title: Family Massacre
programme.desc: When three generations of a family are murdered in their home, police find the main suspect was over 2,000 miles away at the time.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Damages
programme.desc: Patty and Tom try to reach Carol Tobin to uncover the truth about Thanksgiving. Meanwhile, Ellen faces a personal dilemma as her sister's legal troubles test her boundaries at work. S3 E9

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: When Jeff leaves Cloud 9 to work at Target, Garrett leads Glenn to believe that he's poaching other employees to go with him. S3 E16

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature.

programme.title: Buzz's Epic Little Missions
programme.desc: Buzz becomes a beekeeper to find some honey for his crumpets, he’s off on a journey to visit the world’s biggest kauri tree, and goes on a diving adventure with his brother Jonn Boy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join these beloved blue characters as they go on all new adventures that will push the charm, absurdity, and humour of the original series to even greater heights!

programme.title: Scooby Doo And Guess Who?
programme.desc: The team is back and just as courageous, adventurous, humorous & obsessed with cases like before. They are joined by celebrities in their adventures and ghost hunts and in search of puzzles to solve.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: The superheroes Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy love saving the world. But after they decide to stop fighting crime, things do not go as planned.

programme.title: Lu And The Bally Bunch
programme.desc: Navigating preschool life can be tricky! Lu the affectionate ladybird is used to getting her own way - but now, alongside her new classmates, she must learn what it means to be a good friend.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Takaro Tribe as they sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whanau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Good Chef, Bad Chef
programme.desc: Mike, Jacq, Tim and Jo create stunning dishes, balancing bold flavours and wholesome ingredients. Every meal is a delight-what will you try first?

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Masterchef Australia Judge Andy Allen, alongside Michael Weldon and Courtney Roulston take you on a food journey to find the freshest produce and create inspiring recipes in the kitchen.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Absolutely Fabulous
programme.desc: With a suitably chosen wardrobe, Edina and Patsy go on holiday to Provence, where they find the language barrier is the least of their problems. S1 E3

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: John buckles under pressure. David and Amelia strike a deal. Sonny does the unthinkable.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The CBI team attends the scene of a murder in Carson Springs, and Rigsby finds his father Steve in a nearby shack with a bullet in his heart.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a local whale-watching boat mysteriously returns to harbour without its passengers, Charlie and Rex must race against time to find the missing tourists.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of an aerospace engineer, the team discover a secret project the victim was working on.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: When a seemingly simple kidnapping ends in murder, Neville and the team must work out what went wrong and how someone wound up dead.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The cult Canadian mystery set in the 1900s. Murdoch must reveal rather more of himself than he likes when a skeleton is found in a nudist community.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch and The Cloud of Doom: Yannick Bisson stars in the cult mystery set in Toronto in the 1900s. An anonymous madman threatens the city with a deadly toxic gas.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The CBI team attends the scene of a murder in Carson Springs, and Rigsby finds his father Steve in a nearby shack with a bullet in his heart.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a local whale-watching boat mysteriously returns to harbour without its passengers, Charlie and Rex must race against time to find the missing tourists.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank and Lu struggle to help a teenager suffering from nightmarish premonitions of murder.

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: Shade and Angie are hired by a husband to find out if his wife has a stalker. Meanwhile, Shade's ex-wife comes for a surprise visit after Jules invites her to stay with them.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: When a seemingly simple kidnapping ends in murder, Neville and the team must work out what went wrong and how someone wound up dead.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Selwyn struggles in the wake of his shooting, and the community is rocked by a murder at a care home when a game of bingo gets horribly out of hand.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown is helping a friend when the owner of an exclusive gentlemen's club is found dead in cold blood. Meanwhile, Lady Felicia unexpectedly stops by.

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: Shade and Angie are hired by a husband to find out if his wife has a stalker. Meanwhile, Shade's ex-wife comes for a surprise visit after Jules invites her to stay with them.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric. Father Brown deduces that the apparent suicide of a recently returned RAF pilot was actually murder.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: When a seemingly simple kidnapping ends in murder, Neville and the team must work out what went wrong and how someone wound up dead.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The cult Canadian mystery set in the 1900s. Murdoch must reveal rather more of himself than he likes when a skeleton is found in a nudist community.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: Margaret and Todd come to the aid of the governor's wayward sister, which makes Todd's brother nervous.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The cult mystery series set in Toronto in the 1900s. Crabtree and Murdoch clash over belief in the paranormal while hunting a vengeful ghost.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the cult Canadian 1900s mystery series. Murdoch investigates when a department store manager is pushed down a lift shaft.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: Things prove a little hot in the kitchen when the sleuthing duo look into a campaign of culinary sabotage.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: In the 100th episode of the crime drama, a series of flashbacks reveals how Teresa and the CBI team first met and began working with Patrick.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: The Good, the Bad and the Rex: As a pair of armed robbers rip through St. John's, Charlie and Rex work fast to stop them by uncovering the truth behind the spree.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: With a hurricane approaching, Carrie, Al and a captured drug kingpin hole up in an abandoned precinct as their captive's dangerous friends set out to free him.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The arrival of a long-lost brother to a family-run golf club culminates in a body on the course, though a prime suspect with an alibi leaves the team with a conundrum.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The cult mystery series set in Toronto in the 1900s. Crabtree and Murdoch clash over belief in the paranormal while hunting a vengeful ghost.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the cult Canadian 1900s mystery series. Murdoch investigates when a department store manager is pushed down a lift shaft.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: In the 100th episode of the crime drama, a series of flashbacks reveals how Teresa and the CBI team first met and began working with Patrick.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: The Good, the Bad and the Rex: As a pair of armed robbers rip through St. John's, Charlie and Rex work fast to stop them by uncovering the truth behind the spree.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: Things prove a little hot in the kitchen when the sleuthing duo look into a campaign of culinary sabotage.

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: Shade and Angie track a magician who pulled off the ultimate trick: vanishing from police custody. However, their differences of opinion threaten to drive them apart.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The arrival of a long-lost brother to a family-run golf club culminates in a body on the course, though a prime suspect with an alibi leaves the team with a conundrum.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A famous chef is poisoned at the grand opening of his latest hotel, during a cooking competition in which various hopefuls compete for the head chef position.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown tracks down a murderer who's using Kembleford's model village to plan their attacks, while also looking for a secretary after Mrs McCarthy's departure.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Poppy feels hopeless.

programme.title: Refuge: A Duty to Care
programme.desc: Discover the work of a secret haven in rural Aotearoa that temporarily shelters animals from homes fractured by domestic violence, allowing their owners to seek safety.

programme.title: Nothing Trivial
programme.desc: Michelle battles an enemy, as Brian goes out on a limb to save what he loves most. S3 E3

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials

programme.title: Infomercials

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Answer Run
programme.desc: Comedian Jason Manford hosts an exciting, fast-paced quiz show, where three couples face a series of 50/50 questions which hurtle The Answer Run down towards them.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Step Dave
programme.desc: Dave and Cara venture into each other's worlds – grown up dinners with conversation about home renovation versus a wild 21st birthday party. S1 E4

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi heads to Chorlton to help a struggling greasy spoon with a Persian twist. Alex is at the café to try authentic Persian dishes but finds a confused menu and chaotic décor.

programme.title: Dear Life
programme.desc: Season Finale: Andrew shocks Kelly with plans to open a winery in Ballarat. A letter from a recipient reminds Lillian that her healing journey is just beginning. S1 E6

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Alan Carr's Epic Gameshows
programme.desc: Alan Carr welcomes four hopeful couples who pit their wits against the unpredictable deck of cards in the classic gameshow Play Your Cards Right.

programme.title: Secrets Of Your Big Shop
programme.desc: Dr Michael helps Ricardo and his fiancée Ambrose, who are worried about their health, and investigates the viral garlic sinus cleanse and high-street lunch offerings.

programme.title: First Crossings
programme.desc: Modern-day explorers Kevin Biggar and Jamie Fitzgerald are back to undertake more adventures in some of New Zealand’s most iconic locations.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.
